title: HouseholdRoles
description: The membership and role assignment of a single household (FR-HH-001). Provided by Module 14 to every module so they can resolve WHO is in a household and WHAT role each member holds. This contract carries NO financial values and NO secrets — it is membership/role metadata only. Authorization is NOT performed by reading this contract on the client: every cross-user data access MUST still be enforced server-side against the validated session identity (FR-HH-001, platform-decisions §5). The 'kid' role is constrained (no profile switcher, sees only own goals/habits — ux-foundations §10.6).

household_id.description: Stable id of the household unit.

display_name.description: Optional user-chosen household label (displayed verbatim; not translated).

members.description: All members of the household. Exactly one member MUST hold the 'owner' role.

member_id.description: Stable id of this membership edge (household + profile). Distinct from profile_id so the same person could in principle belong to more than one household over time.

profile_id.description: The FinOS profile of this member. NEVER trusted as an authorization source when supplied by a client — acting identity always derives from the validated session (FR-HH-001).

role.description: owner = founder, exactly one per household, cannot be removed by others; admin = can manage members/roles/scopes (step-up MFA gated, FR-X-017); adult = standard member; teen = limited self-management, parental visibility; kid = constrained (no profile switcher; sees only own KidGoals/habits — ux-foundations §10.6, FR-HH-002).

status.description: invited = pending acceptance (no data access yet); active = full membership per role/scope; suspended = membership frozen, all access denied; left = member departed (their links partially revoked, FR-CORE-007). suspended/left members are returned for audit completeness but grant no access.

guardian_member_ids.description: For role kid/teen: the member_ids of the guardian(s) who manage this minor's allowances/goals and hold visibility into them. Empty for adult/admin/owner.

left_at.description: UTC instant the member left, if status = left.

freshness.description: Freshness of the household-roles snapshot. source is typically 'derived' (FinOS-owned, not an external feed) — but is stamped for uniform consumer handling.
